SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF ALLEGRA TAMIRA PORCHIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT POTRERO SERVICE STATION INC. IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS ZHONG QING CHEN (OWNER). DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY A CANTONESE LANGUAGE INTERPRETER, REBECCA CHAU, PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORCHIA, ALLEGRA TAMIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POTRERO SERVICE STATION INC. $7,929.56 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,004.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT POTRERO SERVICE STATION INC. MAILED TO RESPONDENT PORCHIA, ALLEGRA TAMIRA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUL-01-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
